## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] Skill JSON follows the naming convention (`kebab-case.json`)
- [ ] Includes both Chinese and English display names
- [ ] Has meaningful description and tags
- [ ] Handles common popups and edge cases
- [ ] Tested on at least one real device
- [ ] Includes `ai_summary` for result reporting
